text.heading: Place Adverts
Nigerian Content, Global Reach
text.p: Every hour, everyday, MyNaijaNews publishes news from Nigeria, covering such sections as business, politics, entertainment, sports and fashion, exclusively online.
Launched May, 2007, MyNaijaNews is steadily rising to become one of the top ten choices for Nigerian news, and the number one choice for news you won't find anywhere esle.
text.heading: Audience
text.p: MyNaijaNews appeals to and reaches an audience consisting of young, educated and influencial Nigerians. This special geoup of people are drawn to interactive sources of news that give the reader an oppurtunity to 'talk back'
text.heading: Advertising Formats
text.p: Animated GIFs, JPEGs and Shockwave/flash files
text.heading: Advertising Rates
Placing Ads
